prompt_summary: Summarize market trends and competitors for personal trainer management platforms with AI analytics.
impact: Provided insights for Sprint 1 market research; identified key competitors (e.g., Trainerize, TrueCoach) and highlighted our AI data-reporting differentiator.
human_validation: Verified trends against online market research and competitor websites.

prompt_summary: Generate interview questions for personal trainers regarding client data tracking (sleep, stress, energy).
impact: Produced initial interview questions; rephrased 4 questions to focus specifically on data engineering needs and automated reporting pain points.
human_validation: Cross-checked questions against Sprint 1 research goals and Coach User Persona.

prompt_summary: Scaffold ADR for initial tech stack choice (Next.js frontend + FastAPI backend + PostgreSQL).
impact: Created baseline ADR validating FastAPI for efficient data processing and Next.js for the coach/client UI.
human_validation: Reviewed ADR for completeness and alignment with Data Engineering project requirements.

prompt_summary: Generate pytest unit tests for FastAPI DailyLog endpoint, including edge cases for 1-5 scale validation.
impact: Created base test files for client biometric logging. I manually added specific test cases for boundary values (e.g., stress level > 5).
human_validation: Ran tests locally via pytest, confirmed all passed and endpoint validation works.

prompt_summary: Write a bash/batch script for starting the monorepo (FastAPI on port 8000, Next.js on port 3000) concurrently.
impact: Generated the initial start-dev.bat script to streamline the local development workflow.
human_validation: Tested script execution on Windows, resolved pathing and Tailwind CSS caching issues.

prompt_summary: Create SQLAlchemy models for Users (Coach/Client roles) and DailyLogs (sleep, stress, water).
impact: Provided the main database schema structure. I modified the foreign key relationships to correctly link Clients to Coaches.
human_validation: Verified schema relationships and generated Alembic migrations successfully.

prompt_summary: Generate Tailwind CSS 4 layout structure for the Coach Dashboard showing client biometric trends.
impact: Used the generated code as a base for the MVP Coach frontend to visualize sleep and stress data.
human_validation: Checked against the user stories to ensure all critical data points are visible and responsive.
